title: Vegan Smoky Vegetable Skewers
description: A delicious and easy-to-make vegan recipe featuring smoky vegetable skewers, perfect for a quick and healthy meal.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, olive oil, lime juice, salt, and black pepper.
3. Add the zucchini, bell peppers, onions, and mushrooms to the bowl.
4. Toss to coat the vegetables with the marinade.
5. Thread the marinated vegetables onto skewers.
6. Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, or until the vegetables are tender and lightly charred.
7. Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro if desired.
